Title: Verify that POST /api-clients returns 201 Created and access token when registering a new API client with valid name and unique email
Test Execution Steps:
1. Generate a random client name and a unique email address using Faker.
2. Send a POST request to /api-clients with clientName and clientEmail in JSON format.
3. Retrieve the response.
4. Verify the HTTP status code.
5. Verify that the response body contains a non-null accessToken.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 201 Created
• Response body contains a JSON object with accessToken.

Title: Verify that POST /api-clients returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when clientEmail is missing
Test Execution Steps:
1. Generate a random client name and set the email address to null.
2. Send a POST request to /api-clients with clientName and without clientEmail (or null).
3. Retrieve the response.
4. Verify the HTTP status code.
5. Verify the error message details in the response body.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 400 Bad Request
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "missing client email"}

Title: Verify that POST /api-clients returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when clientName is missing
Test Execution Steps:
1. Generate a valid unique email address and set the client name to null.
2. Send a POST request to /api-clients with clientEmail and without clientName (or null).
3. Retrieve the response.
4. Verify the HTTP status code.
5. Verify the error message details in the response body.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 400 Bad Request
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "missing client name"}

Title: Verify that POST /api-clients returns 400 Bad Request and validation error when clientEmail has an invalid email format
Test Execution Steps:
1. Generate a random client name.
2. Set the email address to an invalid format (e.g., "invalid-email-format").
3. Send a POST request to /api-clients with clientName and the invalid clientEmail.
4. Retrieve the response.
5. Verify the HTTP status code.
6. Verify the error message details in the response body.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 400 Bad Request
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "Invalid or missing client email"}

Title: Verify that POST /api-clients returns 409 Conflict and validation error when registering a client with an email address that is already registered
Pre-conditions: An API client has already been registered with a specific email.
Test Execution Steps:
1. Generate a random client name and a unique email address.
2. Register the first client with this email to establish the pre-condition.
3. Generate another random client name.
4. Attempt to register the second client using the exact same email address.
5. Retrieve the response.
6. Verify the HTTP status code.
7. Verify the error message details in the response body.
Expected Result:
• HTTP Status: 409 Conflict
• Response body contains an error object: {"error": "API client already registered. Try a different email"}
